REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1030 - 32 14th Street & 4-6 Divisadero St., Sf, Ca)
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Williams Kuhns for the Co-Admnistrators.

One half of the property is owned by the estate. Therefore, 50% interest is before the Court but 100% is being sold. The first overbid was based on 100% of the amount of $1,391,750.00. The sale was confirmed at $1,432,000.00. Bond is not required. The Court granted the petition, (subject to the written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith./J. Shannon.
